basicDetails.implementingAgency: Women Welfare Department, Government Of Uttarakhand

nodalDepartmentName.label: Department Of Woman Empowerment & Child Development

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Paalna Ghar (Crèche)” is implemented by the Women Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide day care facilities for children aged 6 months to 6 years of working couples.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under the scheme, a crèche is run for the children of working couples, providing day care facilities for children in the age group of 6 months to 6 years. The following fees are applicable under the scheme: - For BPL families: ₹20/- per child per month - For families with an income less than ₹12,000/-: ₹100/- per child per month - For families with an income above ₹12,000/-: ₹200/- per child per month
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide day care facilities for children aged 6 months to 6 years of working couples at a nominal monthly fee in Crèches.

children.text: The scheme “Paalna Ghar (Crèche)” is implemented by the Women Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide day care facilities for children aged 6 months to 6 years of working couples.
Under the scheme, a crèche is run for the children of working couples, providing day care facilities for children in the age group of 6 months to 6 years.
The following fees are applicable under the scheme:
For BPL families: ₹20/- per child per month
For families with an income less than ₹12,000/-: ₹100/- per child per month
For families with an income above ₹12,000/-: ₹200/- per child per month
A crèche is established in every district of Uttarakhand. Working couples can avail of the benefits by paying the applicable fee.

applicationProcess.process_md: A crèche is established in every district of Uttarakhand. Working couples can avail of the benefits by paying the applicable fee.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The beneficiary must be a child aged between 6 months and 6 years.

children.text: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The beneficiary must be a child aged between 6 months and 6 years.
